posts.title: #ebbo #leadersinloyalty #loyaltyevents #loyaltyhabits #loyaltybuilding
posts.author: Ebboloyalty
posts.topic: At #BCG, we’re proud to have partnered with Heidrick & Struggles and INSEAD Corporate Governance Centre to host our latest Board Roundtable Series — bringing together board members, executives, and governance leaders for rich conversations on the future of leadership and corporate stewardship. Ranji
posts.ready_comment: Governance conversations at the board level are most valuable when they move beyond compliance frameworks and into how leadership structures actually enable or constrain transformation speed. Having led a $50M digital transformation across 15 hospitals at Saudi German Hospital Group, I've seen firsthand how board-level clarity on digital strategy can make or break execution timelines when the stakes are high and the complexity is real. The gap between boardroom intent and operational reality often comes down to whether governance models were built for the pace of change they're now being asked to support. What themes around technology governance or digital oversight came up most in these roundtable discussions?
posts.comment_angle: At #BCG, we’re proud to have partnered with Heidrick & Struggles and INSEAD Corp

posts.title: Silicon Valley Employee Tenure: Only 2 Years | SBR2TH posted on ...
posts.author: Sbr2Th
posts.topic: Heidrick & Struggles' first-ever Family Office ... 2026, the data matters. ... This dynamic is reshaping how companies need to think about executive hiring timing,
posts.ready_comment: Family offices are quietly becoming one of the most influential forces in executive talent demand, and most hiring frameworks haven't caught up yet. Running a $50M digital transformation across 15 hospitals taught me how much timing matters when you're building leadership capacity inside rapidly scaling organizations. The lag between strategic growth decisions and executive hiring cycles creates real operational risk, especially in markets like GCC where transformation timelines are compressed by Vision 2030 mandates. Are family offices in this report skewing toward operators with regional emerging market experience, or still defaulting to Western enterprise profiles?
posts.comment_angle: Heidrick & Struggles' first-ever Family Office ... 2026, the data matters. ... T

posts.title: Transforming Strategy into Measurable Results with PMO | Rami ...
posts.author: Rmatar Us
posts.topic: Transforming programs into measurable results — not presentations. From 2010 to 2025, every project carried one goal: turn strategy into results that
posts.ready_comment: The hardest part of program leadership is resisting the pressure to make transformation look good on slides instead of actually delivering it. Leading a $50M digital transformation across 15 hospitals taught me that the gap between strategy and measurable outcomes usually lives in execution discipline, not in the vision itself. The organizations that close that gap fastest are the ones willing to make unpopular calls mid-program when the data says the original plan needs to change. What's been the biggest internal resistance you've faced when pushing teams to stay accountable to outcomes over activity?

posts.title: Sami Elkady's Post
posts.author: Samielkady
posts.topic: ... Project Manager | PMO Lead | ICT & Gov. Digital Transformation (20+ Yrs GCC). 1d. Report this post; Close menu. In today's fast‑moving business
posts.ready_comment: Scaling digital transformation across large, distributed environments is one of the hardest problems in tech leadership, and most frameworks underestimate the human complexity behind it. Running PMO leadership across a multi-hospital digital transformation under Saudi Vision 2030, I saw firsthand how governance structures either accelerate execution or quietly kill it. The difference usually comes down to how well leadership bridges technical roadmaps with clinical and operational realities on the ground. What patterns have you seen work best when aligning ICT strategy with institutional change management at scale?
